feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Code
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Code Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Java Script in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

Would like to ask if someone here has already used the JavaScript function in SAP Build Apps? I am new to Java Scripting and would like to see a guide on how to use this function as well as on what test cases can this be used.

Thank you

entry.title: Why my Store option is not showing in SAP Build Apps Lobby
entry.content: I want to Access Store In SAP BUILD APPS For Pre Build Features but it is not showing me the option. Is it because I did not authenticate it with SAP BTP or is the option of Store is removed by SAP???

entry.title: Linking sales orders to purchase orders
entry.content:
I have a list of purchase orders with multiple line items. I would need to get the sales order number for any of the line items if it exists. If the account assignment category for the purchase order line item is E, then there is a sales order number. This is what i would need to write a query for. So if the purchase order is in the list, i would need to get all of the related line items that have a sales order.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Extracting Table from WebPage
entry.content:
Hi Everyone I Need to extract a table from Webpage. I am using the get list activity to return the values in the array. But it's showing it as a wrong function. Kindly refer to the below screenshots for reference.

error-sap.png

datatable.png

Do suggest me if you have any other method for this.

entry.title: AngularJS code Upgrade using SAP Build Code(Joule Copilot) from 1.6 to Angular 17 version
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We've recently come across "SAP Build Code," featuring AI-driven code generation through Joule Copilot. With this discovery, we're considering leveraging SAP Build Code within our current business scenario, specifically upgrading our frontend from AngularJS 1.6 (with SAP Commerce Cloud in the backend) to the latest stable version, Angular 17.

We've reviewed the existing SAP Build Code documentation and haven't identified a solution tailored to this particular upgrade. Are there any solutions available within SAP Build Code that address our specific needs? Finding a solution here would significantly streamline our upgrade process and save considerable time.

Please note, for our frontend development, we haven't utilized Spartacus (or SAP composable storefront) but have relied on AngularJS.

Thanks,

Srikanth

entry.title: BTP-BUILD -Process Automation for FICA Billing
entry.content:
Hi All

Do we have any ready 1-template, 2-sample process, 3-integration scenario, or 4-API link in BTP BUILD Process Automation?

Thanks in advance for any answer.

entry.title: SAP BTP Deploy Error in CAP Project
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I got error in Deploying the Cap project in Business Application Studio . #SAP CAP

entry.title: How to debug the incident-management app [Tutorial]
entry.content:
I have been following the tutorial incident-management and came across the deployment process as described here https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/deploy-to-cf.html

At the end it is mentioned, that one will not be authenticated when opening the app from the CAP start page due to missing JSON Web Token. In order to start and use the app, one needs the Work Zone. I implemented the work zone and finished the tutorial. Everything works as it should when opening the app from the work zone.

Now I want to debug this app. However, when debugging I cannot open the app from the CAP start page due to the aforementioned missing JSON Web Token [there is the expected 403 error]. How would one go about debugging this app?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Build App Bug
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm testing my application in web browser and it is working fine, able to post the data in database.

But same application if I test in SAP Build Preview App then in that case I'm getting oAuth 2 authorization issue.

I'm calling google firestore database API.

Also after login in web browser I can see all the content getting loaded successfully. But after logging in Mobile Device I'm getting logged in but not data getting displayed.

Refer below screen shot.

REST API

Data Variable Using : Bearer Token

This app works in web browser but not in SAP Build Preview App.

Information is given in this page about signing in with oAuth 2 in firebase doc.

But does anyone have idea how to get [Google_Id_Token] then please drop your answer.

curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY]' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-binary '{"postBody":"id_token=[GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN]&providerId=[google.com]","requestUri":"[http://localhost]","returnIdpCredential":true,"returnSecureToken":true}'

Any idea then please let us know.

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: Error while adding subscription for SAP Build Apps service in BTP Free trial account
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am facing error while adding subscription for SAP Build Apps service in BTP Free trial account. Below mentioned error is showing. Can someone provide solution for this.

SAP Build Code

entry.title: Re: Error while adding subscription for SAP Build Apps se...
entry.content:
Hi Pooja,

Incase you are using the Free Trial account, the Sap build apps service is only available in region AWS US East (VA).

Please follow these steps steps shown in this video https://youtu.be/ZpQM2B1v2GY  

these steps are clear and I have followed them and It's working.

 

Regards,

Abdul Malik

entry.title: VBA Code - Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

How to insert an IF function into SAP VBA Code so that IF a pop up comes up "Data has been changed:", "Do you want to save the changes?" Yes, No or Cancel and I want to Press Yes and enter to continue but I can't seem to figure this out

 

TIA.

entry.title: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content: I was trying out this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-code-test-drive.html#61b6d7a8-81b6-42b5-9342-dd7cb06c312d for Build Code with a Trial Account but when I entered the prompt into Joule I got Error: Request failed with status code 403. How can I solve this?

entry.title: SAP Build Code: purpose of .code files
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have completed SAP Build Code Test Drive tutorials. During the development process, I noticed several files with the extension '.code'.

Could you please clarify the purpose of these files and the potential consequences of editing or removing them?

{
    "version": "2.0",
    "codes": [],
    "configuration": {
        "phase": "on",
        "events": [
            "CREATE"
        ],
        "entity": "loyaltyProgramSrv.Purchases"
    },
    "hash": "710aa051dcacd2609053c4d3517c688c4b4792abad4454d7bc203bfd5f6b5a56ef7e620d7e7db9ad922c7c6eae302cc6fc98da704728746cdc31459744fe5dd8"
}

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: SAP Build Code: Java support
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Can we select Java when adding application logic within SAP Build Code?  The product page states :

Generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development.

However, I couldn't find an option for selecting languages when creating a project or adding application logic.

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project
entry.content:
Hello All,

Using Joule, in SAP Build - Business Application Studio, when I try to generate an Entity and service using AI Joule, I am getting the error message: "TyperNotInstalledError: Will not attempt to generate types as the Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project. Install @cap-js/code-typer as dependency of your project to enable type generation for this project."

Is Joule not going to install the necessary files by itself?

What are the steps to be taken to overcome this issue?

Thanks,

Srihari

entry.title: SAP Build Code - Create Application Logic with Joule
entry.content:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-code-test-drive.html

When I Open in Graphical Modeler, I got a blank screen, do you know why :

"In the Storyboard, click on the Purchases entity under Services, and select Open in Graphical Modeler".

entry.title: Getting "Joule not available" in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
I have created a Dev space for Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools (screenshot below).

When I click on the Joule icon, I get this message:

Joule Not Available

Joule is only available for projects created in a Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools dev space.
Open a Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools project.

Am I doing something wrong or is there a workaround for this?

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: AI Prompt limit in SAP Trial version
entry.content:
Hello Team ,

I understand there is a limit on AI usage in SAP BTP trial .Can you please let me know what is the limit of prompts for daily usage

entry.title: Will Joule also be soon supported in VS Code
entry.content: Is it foreseen that Joule going to be available for usage in VS Code ?
